children.name: 1. Test Case ID: Qdpvk8  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 412, 429, 414, 400, 403, 431, 401  [200] OK:      `{"current":{"block_hash":"0xaa34657bf91e04eb5b506d76a66f688dbfbc509dbf70bc38124d4e8832fdd68a","block_time":"2024-04-09T15:28:21+00:00","slot_number":121099410},"next":{"block_hash":"0xaa34657bf91e04eb5b506d76a66f688dbfbc509dbf70bc38124d4e8832fdd68a","block_time":"2024-04-09T15:28:21+00:00","slot_number":121099410},"previous":{"block_hash":"0xaa34657bf91e04eb5b506d76a66f688dbfbc509dbf70bc38124d4e8832fdd68a","block_time":"2024-04-09T15:28:21+00:00","slot_number":121099410}}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/cardano/date_time_to_slot_number?=false'

1. Test Case ID: GcgbO1  - Server error  [500] Internal Server Error:      `{"id":"538f3283-9755-4b89-b0d8-c16e2c2d5f62","issue":"https://github.com/input-output-hk/catalyst-voices/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml&title=Internal+Server+Error+-+538f3283-9755-4b89-b0d8-c16e2c2d5f62","msg":"Internal Server Error.  Please report the issue to the service owner."}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"sentry": {"dsn": "http://\u0000", "environment": "0", "release": "0"}}' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend

1. Test Case ID: JGCsBH  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
